items.title: US-Iran talks postponed as Vance pulls out of Switzerland trip
items.dek: Lebanon meanwhile says 18 people were killed in clashes in the south and the IDF reports four soldiers killed, despite a truce meant to be in place in the count
items.body: Lebanon meanwhile says 18 people were killed in clashes in the south and the IDF reports four soldiers killed, despite a truce meant to be in place in the country.

items.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 18 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah
items.dek: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.
